name: Schulz's Guacamole Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the dressing by mashing 1 avocado and combining it with 1 tablespoon lemon juice, 1/2 cup sour cream, 1/3 cup oil, and 1 teaspoon picante sauce. Mix well.
2. Tear the lettuce into small pieces and combine with the grated cheeses, scallion, and halved tomatoes in a salad bowl.
3. Cover the salad and refrigerate until serving time.
4. Just before serving, toss the salad with the dressing and sprinkle with crushed Chili Cheese Fritos.
